creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for your submission!

Can you update your patch to:

- Remove the readme related lines, rather than commenting them, and:

* Attach portlint -A output
* Attach poudriere testport output, or output of:

make stage && make check-plist && make stage-qa && make package

I also note this port does not have a maintainer. If you'd like to take maintainership, include that change in your patch update too.

More information can be found here:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing-ports/maintain-port.html
